queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: • Empirical analysis of the contribution of lacking a checking account to credit default probability and borrower risk profiles.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: • Investigating the risk-mitigating determinants of default associated with maintaining a negative checking account balance in consumer lending.

queries.feature_definition: Loan purpose: purchase of radio or TV.
queries.question: • Empirical analysis of the credit risk drivers and reduced default likelihood linked to consumer loans designated for the purchase of radio or television equipment.
